hooks.command: src_changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null) && src_hit=$(echo "$src_changed" | grep -c '^src/' || true) && docs_hit=$(echo "$src_changed" | grep -c '^docs/components/' || true) && if [ "$src_hit" -gt 0 ] && [ "$docs_hit" -eq 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"src/ files were modified but docs/components/ specs were not updated. Update the relevant specification in docs/components/ to reflect the implementation changes before finishing."}'; fi
